reason: Successfully tested agent interaction: navigated to agent, verified status, sent math question, received correct response containing "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Success. Page loaded with agent list visible in sidebar
Clicked on agent "QA-20260709-005048-zkio" in sidebar — Success. Agent detail page loaded and session view ready
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Success. Agent status shows "idle" which is acceptable
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in message input — Success. Message text visible in textbox
Clicked send button — Success. Message sent, session created as "Basic Math Question Session", agent status changed to "working"
Waited for response (up to 3 minutes) — Success. Agent responded within approximately 1 second with answer "2 + 2 = 4"
Verified response mentions "4" — Success. Agent response clearly displays "2 + 2 = 4"
Took screenshot of final state — Success. Screenshot captured showing chat with user message and agent response containing the answer "4"
